docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY SAUNDERS, BRIDGET AS TO DEFENDANT EXPEDIA INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-03-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-03-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-03-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY LAUREEN SNYDER--CUSTOMER SERVICE LEAD AND CRYSTAL LEDBETTER--CUSTOMER SERVICE LEAD. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-03-2012 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT EXPEDIA INC.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAUNDERS, BRIDGET IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT EXPEDIA INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $85.00) SERVED SEP-04-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT EXPEDIA INC.
